sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10350" key="a)ntiperiyu/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπερι-ψύχω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῡ]</foreign>, <sense id="n10350.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cool</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chill in turn,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.691f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
